digest.en: US President Trump has ordered the military to "shoot and kill" Iranian boats that mine the Strait of Hormuz. A US ship seized an Iran-linked tanker in Indian waters. The European Union has approved a $106 billion loan reflecting its view that peace in Ukraine is far away.
digest.hi: भारत के बारे में ट्रंप का विवादित बयान भारत ने क्या कहा? भारतीय विदेश मंत्रालय ने ट्रंप के बयान को अनुचित और अपमानजनक बताया है। भारत ने कहा है कि ट्रंप के बयान से दोनों देशों के संबंधों पर असर पड़ेगा।

articles.title: Trump Threatens Iranian Boats He Says Are Mining the Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices hovered above $100 a barrel as reported ship seizures added to market anxiety. The White House said President Trump does not view Iran's reported seizures as a cease-fire violation.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: US seizes another Iran-linked tanker in Indian
articles.summary: Iran received its first revenue from tolls collected at the Strait of Hormuz. The payment was made after a recent agreement. The official did not disclose the revenue amount. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran receives first revenue from Strait of Hormuz tolls, says official The Times of India.

articles.title: Trump orders U.S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats mining Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: US President Trump ordered the military to shoot and kill Iranian boats mining the Strait of Hormuz. Live updates: Trump orders U. S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats mining Strait of Hormuz NBC News.

articles.title: US military board, seize another ship in international waters
articles.summary: US soldiers boarded and seized a ship in international waters. The Pentagon has released video of US soldiers descending from helicopters to board and seize another ship. US military board, seize another ship in international waters.

articles.title: $106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away
articles.summary: The European Union loaned Ukraine $106 billion for military spending. Unlike previous European assistance packages, this one is heavily weighted toward military spending, meant to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight.

articles.title: Prince Harry makes surprise visit to Ukraine in show of support during war with Russia
articles.summary: Prince Harry visited Ukraine to show support during the war with Russia. Prince Harry makes surprise visit to Ukraine in show of support during war with Russia New York Post.

articles.title: Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Lebanon killed a journalist and targeted first responders. A fragile ceasefire holds as Israeli strikes kill a journalist and target first responders in Lebanon. Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders.

articles.title: UN might keep presence in south Lebanon once UNIFIL mandate ends, says official
articles.summary: The United Nations may maintain a presence in south Lebanon after the UNIFIL mandate ends, according to a UN official. UN might keep presence in south Lebanon once UNIFIL mandate ends, says official The Times of Israel.

articles.title: US to ‘shoot and kill’ Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
articles.summary: US President Trump said the US will shoot and kill Iranian boats laying mines in the Hormuz Strait. US says it intercepted another tanker carrying Iranian oil as Trump underscores alleged infighting within Iran's leadership.

articles.title: Indian seafarer among crew of ship held by Iran in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: An Indian seafarer is among 21 crew members held by Iran onboard the Epaminondas in the Strait of Hormuz. Of two vessels in Iranian custody, one Indian is among the 21 crew onboard Epaminondas.

articles.title: Milan tech firm Bending Spoons picks banks for $20 billion US listing, sources say
articles.summary: Milan tech firm Bending Spoons has chosen banks for a $20 billion US listing, sources reported. Milan tech firm Bending Spoons picks banks for $20 billion US listing, sources say.

articles.title: Warner Bros shareholders back US$110 billion merger with Paramount Skydance
articles.summary: Warner Bros shareholders have approved a $110 billion merger with Paramount and Skydance. Warner Bros shareholders back US$110 billion merger with Paramount Skydance.

articles.title: A Lost Tribe in India Makes Its Exodus to Israel
articles.summary: Israel welcomed the B'nei Menashe, a tribe from India who claim to be the descendants of a king exiled 2,800 years ago, with some evidence supporting their claim. The group has been immigrating to Israel in recent years.

articles.title: Trump orders U.S. Navy to 'shoot, kill' small boats laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Pakistan's minister and a US envoy discussed efforts for a second round of US-Iran talks. Iran’s vow not to reopen the Strait of Hormuz so long as a U. S. naval blockade remained in place.

articles.title: Journalist 'cleared of all charges' after imprisonment for posting Iran war videos
articles.summary: A Kuwaiti journalist was released from custody after being detained for posting Iran war videos. The journalist had been imprisoned for an undisclosed period. A journalist who was detained in Kuwait after posting Iran war videos has been released from custody, Sky News understands.

articles.title: Trump ranks Nato allies in tiers based on defence spending and support in Iran war
articles.summary: US President Trump ranked NATO allies in tiers based on their defence spending and support in the Iran war. The rankings were not publicly disclosed. ‘Naughty or nice?’: Trump ranks Nato allies in tiers based on defence spending and support in Iran war The Times of India.

articles.title: Trump Orders US Navy To "Shoot And Kill" Boats Putting Mines In Hormuz
articles.summary: US President Trump ordered the US Navy to shoot and kill boats laying mines in the Hormuz Strait. Trump extended a ceasefire while maintaining an American blockade. Trump Orders US Navy To "Shoot And Kill" Boats Putting Mines In Hormuz.

articles.title: The Generals Who Are Now Running Iran
articles.summary: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death led to a shift in Iran's leadership structure, with the Revolutionary Guards gaining more power. A collective leadership has taken hold in the country. The killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei ushered in a new form of collective leadership in the country, with more power for the Revolutionary Guards.

articles.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
articles.summary: Two trains collided in Denmark, leaving five people critically hurt, after an accident at a level crossing north of Copenhagen on Thursday. The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

articles.title: Russian Officials Say Town’s Air Is Toxic, Days After Strike on Oil Refinery
articles.summary: Ukraine's strike on an oil refinery in Tuapse has left residents reporting dark, oily toxins falling from the sky, with Russian officials saying the town's air is toxic. Since Ukraine attacked the refinery in Tuapse, starting a huge fire, residents have reported drops of dark, oily toxins falling from the sky.

articles.title: Libya oscillates between cooperation and illusion
articles.summary: Libyan representatives from both sides of the political divide are participating in a US-led military exercise, marking a tentative sign of cooperation in the divided country. For the first time, representatives from both sides of Libya's political divide are participating in Flintlock, a multinational military exercise under US leadership.

articles.title: भारत के बारे में एक 'विवादित' बयान को ट्रंप ने किया शेयर, भारत ने क्या कहा?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने विवादित टिप्पणियां शेयर कीं, जिसमें जन्मसिद्ध नागरिकता और कुछ देशों पर टिप्पणी की गई. भारत में इस पर तीखी प्रतिक्रियाएं आईं. अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने जन्मसिद्ध नागरिकता और कुछ देशों को लेकर रेडियो होस्ट माइकल सैवेज की विवादित टिप्पणियां ट्रूथ सोशल पर पोस्ट की हैं.

hi.title: भारत के बारे में एक 'विवादित' बयान को ट्रंप ने किया शेयर, भारत ने क्या कहा?
hi.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने विवादित टिप्पणियां शेयर कीं, जिसमें जन्मसिद्ध नागरिकता और कुछ देशों पर टिप्पणी की गई. भारत में इस पर तीखी प्रतिक्रियाएं आईं. अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने जन्मसिद्ध नागरिकता और कुछ देशों को लेकर रेडियो होस्ट माइकल सैवेज की विवादित टिप्पणियां ट्रूथ सोशल पर पोस्ट की हैं.

articles.title: 'लश्कर-जैश पर नकेल कसे पाकिस्तान', पहलगाम हमले की बरसी पर अमेरिकी सांसदों ने एक सुर में उठाई मांग
articles.summary: अमेरिकी सांसदों ने पहलगाम हमले की बरसी पर पाकिस्तान से मांग की कि वह लश्कर-जैश जैसे आतंकवादी समूहों पर कार्रवाई करे। यह मांग एकसुर में उठाई गई। 'लश्कर-जैश पर नकेल कसे पाकिस्तान', पहलगाम हमले की बरसी पर अमेरिकी सांसदों ने एकसुर में उठाई मांग।

articles.summary: अमेरिकी नाकेबंदी के कारण ईरान पर शिकंजा कसा जा रहा है। US आर्मी ने बताया कि अब तक 31 जहाज लौटे वापस हैं। अमेरिकी नाकेबंदी से ईरान पर कसा शिकंजा, US आर्मी बोली- अब तक 31 जहाज लौटे वापस।

articles.title: बंगाल में बंपर वोटिंग, 91.40% वोट पड़े, तमिलनाडु में अब तक का सर्वाधिक मतदान
articles.summary: पश्चिम बंगाल में पहले चरण में 91.40% मतदान हुआ, जो एक उच्च मतदान प्रतिशत है। तमिलनाडु में भी उच्च मतदान हुआ, जो राज्य में अब तक का सर्वाधिक मतदान है। यह मतदान 152 और 234 सीटों के लिए हुआ था।

articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस नाटो देशों की एक सूची बना रहा है, जिसमें दोस्तों को गिफ्ट और दुश्मनों को सजा दी जाएगी। यह निर्णय ट्रंप के नाटो सहयोगियों के साथ संबंधों के कारण लिया गया है।

articles.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा है कि वह ईरान के साथ युद्ध के लिए तैयार हैं। ईरान ने चेतावनी दी है कि अगर अमेरिका ने हमला किया तो वह एक और नरक बना देगा। यह बयान अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव को बढ़ा रहा है।
